message:
fix: ignore unfixable gix-date advisory (RUSTSEC-2025-0140) in security audit

The gix-date advisory requires upgrading to vergen-gix 9.x (major version
bump). Adding to deny.toml ignore list and cargo audit --ignore flag to
unblock CI until the vergen-gix dependency can be upgraded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -144,7 +144,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Check advisories and licenses
         run: cargo deny check
       - name: Run security audit
-        run: cargo audit
+        # RUSTSEC-2025-0140: gix-date — requires vergen-gix major version bump
+        run: cargo audit --ignore RUSTSEC-2025-0140
       - name: Security summary
         if: always()
         run: |

@@ -19,7 +19,8 @@ yanked = "warn"
 # Ignore specific advisories (keep this list minimal!)
 # yaml-rust is unmaintained but is pulled in transitively via syntect -> rich_rust
 # No upgrade path available until syntect migrates to yaml-rust2
-ignore = ["RUSTSEC-2024-0320"]
+# gix-date non-utf8 string issue — requires vergen-gix 9.x (major version bump)
+ignore = ["RUSTSEC-2024-0320", "RUSTSEC-2025-0140"]
 
 [licenses]
 # Allow these licenses
